symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from transformer tank. Infrared scan showed `extreme` localized heating around LV bushing terminations (`115°C`).
root_cause: Severe harmonic current loading (`THD > 67%`) from downstream VFD drives caused elevated eddy current and stray load losses inside transformer core/windings.
action_taken: Replaced faulty cooling fan control thermostat switch (`Spec-765`), serviced fan bank electrical panel, cleaned radiator fins, and verified top oil temperature dropped to `71°C`.
parts_used: Fan Bank Control Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 460V, Type II Dielectric Oil (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Oil moisture content critically high (`405 ppm ppm`). Breakdown voltage (dielectric strength) dropped to `460V kV` (`warning < 30kV`). Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit PANEL-401.
root_cause: Transient overvoltages (`460V +/- 3%` spike) from switching surges and lightning strikes caused micro-perforations and partial discharge inside inter-turn paper insulation.
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives (`P/N 5231-C`).
parts_used: Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (50 Gal), Transformer Breather Assembly, Antioxidant Oil Additive Package

symptom_description: Top oil temperature gauge reading `88`°C (`high alarm setpoint 85°C`). Winding hot-spot temperature indicator reaching `102°C` under `76%` load. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PANEL-401.
root_cause: Severe harmonic current loading (`THD > 60%`) from downstream VFD drives caused elevated eddy current and stray load losses inside transformer core/windings.
action_taken: Replaced faulty cooling fan control thermostat switch (`Spec-516`), serviced fan bank electrical panel, cleaned radiator fins, and verified top oil temperature dropped to `71°C`.
parts_used: Fan Bank Control Relay, Cooling Fan Motor 460V, Type II Dielectric Oil (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Buchholz relay tripped transformer off-line. Gas sample from relay analyzed as `13%` combustible (fault gases).
root_cause: Free water accumulation (`86 lbs gallons`) in tank bottom due to failed silica gel breather (`3 years` saturation) and poor tank sealing.
action_taken: Drained `164 lbs gal` free water from tank bottom, replaced breached explosion vent diaphragm (`P/N 5689-A`), and ran thermo-vacuum oil treatment for `28 months`.
parts_used: Explosion Vent Diaphragm, Vacuum Rig Coalescing Filter, Type II Oil (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) annual oil sample showed elevated acetylene (`> 402 ppm ppm`) and hydrogen (`> 300 ppm`), indicating internal arcing/partial discharge.
root_cause: Long-term thermal degradation and chemical depolymerization of Kraft paper winding insulation caused by operating at sustained high load temperatures (`> 160°C`) over `12` years.
action_taken: Scheduled emergency outage, connected mobile vacuum oil purification/dehydration rig, circulated and dried oil to `< 31 ppm ppm` moisture, and added metal passivator chemical (`Spec-937`).
parts_used: Fuller's Earth Filter Cartridges (Set of 6), Silica Gel Breather Desiccant Charge (10 lbs), Oil Passivator Additive (1 Gal)

symptom_description: Dissolved Gas Analysis (DGA) annual oil sample showed elevated acetylene (`> 36 ppm ppm`) and hydrogen (`> 300 ppm`), indicating internal arcing/partial discharge.
root_cause: Loose core clamping bolts (`47 ft-lbs` under-torqued) caused core lamination vibration (`52 Hz`), mechanically abrading the winding insulation (`0.015 gap`).
action_taken: Untanked core assembly, tightened loose core clamps (`232 in-lbs` torque), repaired abraded insulation with crepe paper taping (`P/N 8176-X`), and baked core to dry.
parts_used: Crepe Paper Insulation Tape, Cotton Tying Cord, Varnish Coating (1 Gal)

symptom_description: Oil moisture content critically high (`39 ppm ppm`). Breakdown voltage (dielectric strength) dropped to `230V kV` (`warning < 30kV`).
root_cause: Transient overvoltages (`460V +/- 2%` spike) from switching surges and lightning strikes caused micro-perforations and partial discharge inside inter-turn paper insulation.
action_taken: De-energized transformer, performed comprehensive electrical testing (TTR, Winding Resistance, Sweep Frequency Response Analysis), dried oil via vacuum rig, and added antioxidant additives (`Spec-273`).
parts_used: Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (50 Gal), Transformer Breather Assembly, Antioxidant Oil Additive Package

symptom_description: Transformer tripping on top-stage oil temperature relay (`>121`°C) during peak afternoon ambient temperature (`+moderate` above design).
root_cause: External radiator fins heavily clogged (`66%` blocked) with airborne cottonwood fluff, dust, and industrial dirt, reducing convective heat rejection by `> 50%`.
action_taken: Thoroughly washed exterior radiator cooling fins to remove cottonwood/dirt blockage (`6.7 lbs`), replaced 2 burned-out cooling fan motors (`P/N 1741-A`), and checked oil level indicator.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assemblies (Set of 2), Fan Control Thermostat Switch, Radiator Fin Cleaner

symptom_description: Transformer emitting unusual buzzing/crackling sound inside tank (`0.50` in/sec RMS on shell). Ultrasonic acoustic survey detected partial discharge (`44 Hz` pulses/sec) near HV winding.
root_cause: Free water accumulation (`143 lbs gallons`) in tank bottom due to failed silica gel breather (`15 months` saturation) and poor tank sealing.
action_taken: Drained `127 lbs gal` free water from tank bottom, replaced breached explosion vent diaphragm (`Spec-121`), and ran thermo-vacuum oil treatment for `2 years`.
parts_used: Explosion Vent Diaphragm, Vacuum Rig Coalescing Filter, Type II Oil (5 Gal)

symptom_description: Transformer main oil level gauge showing `63%` low level (`near bottom mark`). Noticeable accelerated dielectric oil pooling (`2.2 ft` spread) on concrete pad under radiator banks. Inspected power and control interconnects running to PANEL-401 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole (`0.008 gap`) developed at bottom weld seam of external cooling radiator fin due to water pooling (`pH 9.0`) and debris trapping.
action_taken: Repaired leaking radiator weld seam using approved epoxy/brazing procedure (`P/N 5490-X`), replaced tap changer O-ring seal, and refilled transformer with certified Type II dielectric mineral oil (`161 lbs`).
parts_used: Tap Changer Shaft O-Ring Kit, Transformer Drain Valve 2-inch, Inhibited Mineral Oil (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Ops flagged oil leakage from radiator drain valve and tap changer gasket. Dielectric oil level dropped `moderate` below normal indicator mark (`-32%` volume). Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PANEL-401.
root_cause: Corrosion pinhole (`0.009 gap`) developed at bottom weld seam of external cooling radiator fin due to water pooling (`pH 9.4`) and debris trapping.
action_taken: Repaired leaking radiator weld seam using approved epoxy/brazing procedure (`P/N 5312-A`), replaced tap changer O-ring seal, and refilled transformer with certified Type II dielectric mineral oil (`138 lbs`).
parts_used: Tap Changer Shaft O-Ring Kit, Transformer Drain Valve 2-inch, Inhibited Mineral Oil (10 Gal)

symptom_description: Transformer main oil level gauge showing `77%` low level (`near bottom mark`). Noticeable distinct dielectric oil pooling (`2.0 ft` spread) on concrete pad under radiator banks.
root_cause: Age-related hardening, shrinkage, and compression set of nitrile rubber gaskets (`0.15 inch` gap) on main tank cover and bushing flanges after `12` years of outdoor exposure.
action_taken: De-energized and grounded transformer, lowered oil level slightly, re-torqued main cover and bushing flange bolts (`344 in-lbs` torque) in crisscross pattern, and topped off with `23 lbs` degassed mineral oil.
parts_used: Nitrile-Cork Transformer Gasket Sheet Kit, Type II Inhibited Dielectric Mineral Oil (15 Gallons), Flange Bolt Set

symptom_description: Nitrogen blanket pressure dropping rapidly (`-11.6 PSI/day`). Oil weeping (`747 oz/hr`) around LV bushing mounting flange.
root_cause: Gasket failure (`87%` torn) on the sudden pressure relay (`SPR`) mounting flange allowed pressurized nitrogen and oil mist to escape.
action_taken: Drained `20 lbs` of oil, removed LV bushing, cleaned sealing surfaces (`3.7 lbs` removed), installed new molded nitrile gasket (`Spec-487`), and reassembled.
parts_used: LV Bushing Molded Gasket, Type II Oil (55 Gal Drum), Contact Cleaner Spray

symptom_description: Oil moisture content critically high (`32 ppm ppm`). Breakdown voltage (dielectric strength) dropped to `480V kV` (`warning < 30kV`). Unit overdrawing current when PANEL-401 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Moisture ingress into dielectric oil (`water content > 18 ppm ppm`) absorbed by cellulose paper insulation, drastically reducing breakdown voltage capacity (`< 460V +/- 2% kV`).
action_taken: Performed on-site vacuum oil processing and Fuller's earth reclamation (`Spec-221`) to remove polar compounds and acids, dried winding cellulose, and re-tested power factor (`Tan-Delta < 0.4%`).
parts_used: Vacuum Rig Filter Elements, Type II Dielectric Oil Top-off (30 Gal), Indicating Silica Gel Desiccant

root_cause: External radiator fins heavily clogged (`33%` blocked) with airborne cottonwood fluff, dust, and industrial dirt, reducing convective heat rejection by `> 50%`.
action_taken: Thoroughly washed exterior radiator cooling fins to remove cottonwood/dirt blockage (`2.0 lbs`), replaced 2 burned-out cooling fan motors (`Spec-893`), and checked oil level indicator.
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assemblies (Set of 2), Fan Control Thermostat Switch, Radiator Fin Cleaner

symptom_description: Oil moisture content critically high (`95 ppm ppm`). Breakdown voltage (dielectric strength) dropped to `460V kV` (`warning < 30kV`).
root_cause: Moisture ingress into dielectric oil (`water content > 92 ppm ppm`) absorbed by cellulose paper insulation, drastically reducing breakdown voltage capacity (`< 230V kV`).
action_taken: Performed on-site vacuum oil processing and Fuller's earth reclamation (`Spec-172`) to remove polar compounds and acids, dried winding cellulose, and re-tested power factor (`Tan-Delta < 0.4%`).
